Ntc Of Mtn; Evidence Code; 1043 Mtn To Disclose Peace Officer Personnel Records And Evidence Code 1045 Mtn To Disclose Records Of Complaints, Investigations Of Complaints And Discipline Imposed And Evidence Code
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lizabeth N. de Vries, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Chen Ming
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Chen Ming's Motion To Disclose Peace Officer Personnel Records Of Complaints, Investigations Of Complaints, And Discipline Imposed is granted in part and denied in part.

The motion is granted as to Request No. 1 for excessive force by Officer Frost.

The motion is denied as to Nos. 7-16.

The motion is denied as to Nos. 3, 4, and 6.

The records shall be produced to the court for in camera review. Any documents ordered to be produced shall be subject to a Protective Order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar
